## Status: FLAKY_OOM (not a code error)

The deployment failure is the **known Jest worker OOM crash**, not a code defect.

```
⨯ app/repe/models/page.tsx doesn't have a root layout.
Error: Jest worker encountered 1 child process exceptions, exceeding retry limit
```

This is the same crash pattern seen in:
- dpl_7y1E5W2qa9pbxeQrAoHXiPLWR1du (commit 8b8a1069) — ERROR
- dpl_6VeZjfoDhJ4CF7d9MApPSViV9ynd (commit 93286c5d) — ERROR
- Multiple others in the past 48 hours

The layout hierarchy is intact:
- `app/layout.tsx` ✅
- `app/app/layout.tsx` ✅
- `app/app/repe/layout.tsx` ✅
- `app/app/repe/models/page.tsx` (page, not missing layout)

The same file was building fine in the immediately prior commit (fbb3e298, READY). The crash is non-deterministic OOM on Vercel's 8GB build machine. **A manual redeploy from the Vercel dashboard will resolve this.**

## Code Changes (BF-001)

The actual code change in cd84d8c8 is clean:
- Removed 37+ local duplicate `fmtMoney`, `fmtPct`, `fmtDate`, `fmtMultiple`, etc. definitions
- All files now import from `@/lib/format-utils`
- `chart-theme.ts` and `local-training/ui.tsx` re-export for downstream consumers
